title: SOL 15pk White Unscented Tea Light Candles Long Burning – 3.5 Hour Burn Time, Ideal for Home, Relaxation, Spa, Massage, Romantic Dinners, Weddings & Anniversaries, Festive Decor, DIY & Cosy Evenings
features: Long-Lasting Burn - Create a lasting glow with up to 3.5hr burn time designed for calm evenings & special occasions. These long burn candles offer a steady flame and refined ambience, making them long lasting candles you’ll reach for again and again.

Perfect for Crafts and DIY - From centrepieces to lanterns and seasonal décor, these white t lights bring subtle beauty to every detail. A timeless choice of unscented candles for styling, gifting, & handmade creations—clean, elegant, & effortless.

Ideal for Food Settings - Enjoy candlelit dining without distraction. These white unscented candles are non scented candles tea lights made to complement meals, not compete with them—ideal for dinner parties, restaurants, romantic tables, and hosting

Compact and Convenient - Neatly sized and easy to store, these tlight candles slip seamlessly into daily routines and celebrations. Use them as classic t candles and a versatile unscented candle option whenever you want graceful light, anywhere.

Versatile Ambience - Gentle and inviting, these candles unscented are ideal for baths, meditation, gatherings, and quiet evenings. They’re perfect tea lights unscented, tea lights long burning, and dependable long burn tea lights for every mood.
